hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' || exit 0; output=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); [ -z "$output" ] && exit 0; echo "$output" | head -30; exit 2

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE 'src/(views|components)/.*\.tsx$' || exit 0; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"UI file modified. Run /check-responsive and /check-a11y before marking the task as complete."}}'

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -q 'package\.json' || exit 0; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"package.json modified. Run /update-badges to sync README.md badges."}}'

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'npm version' || exit 0; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Version bumped. Run /sync-version to sync the version across all project files."}}'
